meta.title: My Language Coach — A coach that remembers you. Feedback after every chat.
meta.description: Your AI language coach remembers what you've discussed, gives you a feedback report after every conversation, and lets you role-play real-life scenarios. In 12 languages.

hero.headline: Practice languages.
hero.subheadline: An AI coach who remembers you, gives you feedback after every chat, and lets you step into real-life role-plays — in 12 languages.

f1.title: A coach who knows you
f1.body: Your coach remembers what you've talked about, your level, and what to revisit. Every session builds on the last — not a cold start.

f2.title: Real-life scenarios
f2.body: Order coffee. Check into a hotel. Survive a job interview. Ten role-plays where your coach steps into character — and so do you.

f3.title: Feedback that actually helps
f3.body: After every conversation: your highlights, what to polish, and the new words worth remembering. Saved so you can come back to them.

s1.title: Pick a language
s1.body: Twelve to choose from — French, German, Italian, Spanish, Turkish, Portuguese, and more.

s2.title: Talk or role-play
s2.body: Free chat with your coach Lisa, or step into a scenario and meet a stranger in role.

s3.title: Review your feedback
s3.body: Three panels after every chat: highlights, corrections, and new vocab — yours to revisit anytime.

pricing.title: Free to start. Pro when you're ready.
pricing.subtitle: Two coffees a month. Or one annual cup.

free.label: Free
free.headline: Everything you need to start
items: Feedback for your current session + last 3

pro.label: Pro
pro.headline: When you want everything unlocked
items: Deep memory — weak areas, personal context, themes

pricing.footnote: Upgrade from inside the app once you've signed up. Cancel anytime in your store settings.

finalCta.title: Ready to start talking?
finalCta.subtitle: Free to try. Pro at $7.99/mo if you decide to stick around.

deleteAccount.title: Delete your My Language Coach account
deleteAccount.intro: Enter the email you signed up with. We'll send a one-time confirmation link. Click it to permanently delete your account and all associated data.
deleteAccount.sent: If an account with that email exists, we sent a confirmation link. Check your inbox (and spam folder). The link expires in 24 hours.
deleteAccount.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again in a few minutes.
deleteAccount.whatIsDeletedList: Your email, name, profile picture, chat messages, conversation history, streaks, saved vocabulary, push notification tokens, and subscription entitlements.
deleteAccount.whatIsKeptList: Anonymized financial records of purchases (no longer linked to you, retained for tax-reporting purposes), and anonymized aggregate analytics (no longer linked to you).
deleteAccount.confirmIntro: This will permanently delete your account and all your practice history. This cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.confirmInvalid: This deletion link is invalid or has already been used.
deleteAccount.confirmExpired: This deletion link has expired. Request a new one.
deleteAccount.confirmFailed: We couldn't complete the deletion. Try again, or contact support.
deleteAccount.doneBody: Your account and all associated data have been deleted. We're sorry to see you go.
